payload.title: Reconcile local event actor names with hosted account ids for sync authz
payload.description: SCP-172 gates /api/sync/push on event.actor === authenticated principal (account id). But local workspaces stamp human-readable actors (e.g. "bri", "claude"), while hosted principals are account ids (acct_…). So a local->hosted push fails the actor check until the two are reconciled. Options: per-remote actor identity mapping in the sync client, or an account alias table on the hub. Blocks real cross-identity hosted sync.
